description: Source-of-truth manifest for the Kahneman discipline pattern. Consumed by scripts/check-kahneman-consistency.sh and the kahneman-sync-audit workflow. Public/default tree only audits this repository; operators may extend the list locally for private fleets.

title_patterns.canonical: # Kahneman disciplines — hygiene para decisões de IA
title_patterns.peer_specific: # Kahneman disciplines — higiene de decisão no peer
title_patterns.civm_template: # Kahneman disciplines — template portátil de higiene de decisão

framing_variants: every commit, PR, SPEC, milestone, and ADR

surface_styles.h2_top5: Full §"Decision hygiene (Kahneman)" H2 section with 5 numbered rules + universal framing + doc link.
surface_styles.inline_bold: Compact bold preamble paragraph above the first H2: **Decision hygiene (Kahneman) — always on, every change.** ... + universal framing + doc link. No separate Top-5 — those live in the linked CLAUDE.md.
